basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website www.nio.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Associate - I: MSc Environmental Science

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR NIO is 28th June 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Associate - I position, candidates must possess an MSc in Environmental Science. This is the primary educational requirement specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate - I position announced by CSIR NIO in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate - I at CSIR NIO is a contractual job. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR NIO located?
faq.answer: CSIR NIO is located in Kochi, Kerala. The recruitment is for a project based in this location.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is SSP003754/3213-26. This number should be used for any official correspondence or reference.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the job is located in Kochi, Kerala, the notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for application. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds are encouraged to apply if they meet the criteria.
